Story quest chain

New Lifeform

14 parts

Rewards8

Chain Overview

StartWarp Gate
SystemVibrilian
Parts14
First questNew Lifeform: Part 1

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Route & Targets

  • System: Vibrilian
  • System: Sarkinon
  • System: Mitrilion
  • System: Cynapsian
  • System: Zergilin
  • Location: Barbulos in Vibrilian
  • Location: Fexucius in Sarkinon
  • Location: Aladivin in Sarkinon
  • Location: Orgasin in Mitrilion
  • Location: Efedrit in Cynapsian
  • Location: Glictan in Zergilin
  • Location: Exretorum in Cynapsian

Part 1: New Lifeform: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Warp Gate in Vibrilian.
  2. Travel to Barbulos.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 2.

Description

Captain, we have found a new lifeform on Barbulos, its a sentient being and we think its trying to communicate with us. Land on Barbulos and figure out a way to understand what it wants.

Completion

Intelligent Sponge: “bzzarrpp bzaarr zbbzazbbr bzzazaaaaa bzzaaooprp”

Crew: “I think we need to visit someone who can translate this into our language. I heard Krux, a linguist, was last seen on Fexucius in Sarkinon where he tries to communicate with an unknown lifeform.”

Part 2: New Lifeform: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Fexucius

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Fexucius.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 3.

Description

Land on Fexucius in Sarkinon and show Krux the recording of the new lifeform.

Completion

Krux: “Ohh.. you again, or maybe I mistake you for another one. I don’t see many bipedal species nowadays. But you have a very interesting recording I must say, last time I was on Barbulos the sponge was completely silent and it didn’t seem to be sentient at all. Something must have sparked its interest. You need to take me there!”

Part 3: New Lifeform: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Barbulos.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 4.

Description

Travel back to Barbulos in Vibrilian and let Krux analyze what the intelligent sponge is trying to communicate.

Completion

Intelligent Sponge: “bzzarrpp bza bzaarr zbbzazbbr bz bzzaza bzzazaaaaa bzzaaooprp bz”

Krux: “Hmm.. I’m not sure, but I think it wants to trade, or maybe give you something. Ahh.. it wants to trade Amygdala Ooze for, what I think is an artifact. I heard that the planet Aladivin in Sarkinon is full of those Ooze organisms.”

Part 4: New Lifeform: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Aladivin

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Aladivin.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 5.

Description

Travel to Aladivin in Sarkinon and collect Amygdala Ooze.

Completion

Crew: “Captain, we have the Ooze secured in our cargo hold. It’s a really juicy organism, I wonder what the sponge wants to do with it.”

Part 5: New Lifeform: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 1xlvl60 artifact

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Barbulos.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 6.

Description

Travel back to Barbulos and give the Ooze to the intelligent sponge.

Completion

Intelligent Sponge: “bza zz”

Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp*

Krux: “I think it said something along the lines of, ‘ahhh.. fresh ooze. “

Intelligent Sponge: “zra zap bzzzaaarr bzp”

Krux: “It wants another meal, but this time it wants an Ice Giant. I heard they exist on the planet Orgasin in Mitrillion..”

Part 6: New Lifeform: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Orgasin

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Orgasin.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 7.

Description

Kidnap an Ice Giant from Orgasin in Mitrillion.

Completion

Crew: “This doesn’t seem ethical, are you sure you want to do this?”

Krux: “Of course he is, nothing is as important as a communicating sponge bzz!”

Crew: “...”

Part 7: New Lifeform: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 1xlvl70 artifact

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Barbulos.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 8.

Description

Hand over the kidnapped Ice Giant to the somewhat evil sponge.

Completion

Intelligent Sponge: “bza zz zzrrat ttzzz”

Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp*

Krux: “See, its not truly evil.. now it wants a Nezerian soldier.. This is getting interesting! It promised more artifacts in exchange.”

Part 8: New Lifeform: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 4000-4200 + 8 Flux

Travel / deliver to Efedrit

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Efedrit.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 9.

Description

Land on Argenon in Cynapsian and kidnap a Nezerian soldier from an enemy fortress .

Completion

Krux: “You are bzzzt lucky today, we found one outside when he was doing a bzrtzz, gagged and ready to be eaten!”

Crew: “This doesn’t seem right...”

Krux: “Sponge is the main purpose in life.. I tell you..bzz”

Part 9: New Lifeform: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 3xlvl75 artifacts

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Barbulos.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 10.

Description

Hand over the gagged Nezerian soldier to the sponge at Barbulos in Vibrilian.

Completion

Krux: “bzrtzzz zz zzaz”

Intelligent Sponge: “btza zz zzssarrat ttzzaaz” *Gulp*

Krux: “artifacts… bz.. yours… bzzztaazz”

Crew: “I think we better move out of here, the spores have infected his brain somehow..”

Krux: “ztaazz!”

Part 10: New Lifeform: Part 10

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Glictan

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Glictan.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 11.

Description

For fun and possibly a few artifacts, land on Glictan and kidnap a renegade spy!

Completion

Crew: “You really are crazy about those artifacts. But I guess the renegades deserve it after all..”

Part 11: New Lifeform: Part 11

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 5xlvl80 Artifacts

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Barbulos.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 12.

Description

Land on Barbulos and prepare the not so innocent renegede spy to the sponge for dinner.

Completion

Krux: “bzrt zazz zrtz zza zzaaa”

Intelligent Sponge: “bzz tza zz zzssarr at ttzz aatzzzzz”

Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp*

Krux: “bzzz!”

Part 12: New Lifeform: Part 12

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Travel / deliver to Exretorum

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Exretorum.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 13.

Description

For the fireworks, land on Exretorum in Cynapsian and kidnap a dread moth larva!

Completion

Crew: “Yup, you are indeed crazy! But I’m eager to see how this turns out.”

Part 13: New Lifeform: Part 13

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 50k Steel + 5 (lvl80) arts

Travel / deliver to Barbulos

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Barbulos.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock New Lifeform: Part 14.

Description

Give the nearly-exploding dread moth larva to the sponge for dinner.

Completion

Intelligent Sponge: “btza zzaa z”

Krux: “baa z zz zzartz”

Intelligent Sponge: *Gulp*

*EXPLOSION*

Krux: *shocked*

Crew: “Err… I think we just killed the sponge. Krux seem okay though, although somewhat disoriented maybe, we should take him home again.”

Part 14: New Lifeform: Part 14

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Fexucius

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Fexucius.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Bring the shocked and the somewhat dilerious Krux back to Fexucius in Sarkinon.

Completion

Krux: “Thank you for taking me home again, I remember everything now, but the sponge controlled every action I took. I think it had a very sofisticated mind, but it was very angry and it was hard to make sense of it all. But I’m glad you helped me get out of there in time, I wasn’t prepare to live the rest of my life as a sponge just yet.“

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
